docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHAIKH, SALIM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPINOSA, BRANDON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1544 CALIFORNIA ST #227, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109 COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAIKH, SALIM SERVED DEC-29-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOSA, BRANDON
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $28.57 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAIKH, SALIM
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAIKH, SALIM AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOSA, BRANDON SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAIKH, SALIM AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOSA, BRANDON
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOSA, BRANDON
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOSA, BRANDON
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON DEC-30-2024.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOSA, BRANDON
